title: Planning Unit
description: Schema for a governed planning unit within an Axion run.

plan_item_id.description: Unique identifier for this plan unit.

run_id.description: The run this plan unit belongs to.

mapped_canonical_entity.description: Reference to the canonical entity this unit addresses.

template_output.description: The template artifact this unit is expected to produce.

standards_obligation.description: The standards rule(s) this unit must satisfy.

acceptance_evidence.description: The acceptance criterion or proof artifact that demonstrates completion.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the plan unit.

failure_reason.description: Required when status is failed. Explanation of why the unit could not be satisfied.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this plan unit was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to this plan unit.
